description: This epic mail armor of item level 127 goes in the "Head" slot. It is crafted. Added in World of Warcraft: The Burning Crusade. Always up to date.
name: Gadgetstorm Goggles

normalized_requirements.raw_text: Gadgetstorm Goggles Phase 2 Item Level 127 Binds when picked up Head Mail 726 Armor +28 Stamina Meta Socket Blue Socket Socket Bonus: +5 Spell Damage and Healing Durability 85 / 85 Requires Level 62 Requires Engineering (350) Equip: Improves spell hit rating by 12. Equip: Improves spell critical strike rating by 40. Equip: Increases damage and healing done by magical spells and effects by up to 55. Equip: Shows the location of all nearby gas clouds on the minimap. Equip: Slightly increases your stealth detection. Use: Allows you to look far into the distance. (3 Sec Cooldown) Sell Price: 5 83 63 This epic mail armor of item level 127 goes in the "Head" slot. It is crafted. Added in World of Warcraft: The Burning Crusade. Always up to date.
